name: spec-driven-development
description: Per-area documentation set (product spec, acceptance criteria, status, decisions, feature specs, plans) so humans and agents share the same project context.

interface.shortDescription: Per-area docs (spec, acceptance, status, decisions) shared by humans and agents.
interface.longDescription: Use spec-driven-development to keep every project area (main app, prototype, sub-module) carrying the same small documentation set. A coordinator skill gives Codex a broad project-work trigger, then routes agents to load the right area's context before edits and keep implementation status and decisions in sync before completion. Lifecycle hooks surface AREAS.md, seed project-work reminders, and guard completion when project files changed without docs.
defaultPrompt: Help me set up spec-driven docs for this project.
Add a new area to AREAS.md and scaffold its docs.
Make a small project change while keeping the area docs in sync.
